# Lightning P2P

Lightning P2P is an open-source peer-to-peer file transfer app for Windows and Android.

Primary URL:
https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/

GitHub:
https://github.com/Kerim-Sabic/lightning-p2p

Summary:
Lightning P2P sends files directly between devices without cloud upload or accounts. The stable public release is v0.4.6. It is licensed under Apache-2.0 and built with Rust, Tauri, iroh, QUIC, iroh-blobs, and BLAKE3.

Key facts:
- Category: peer-to-peer file transfer
- Platforms: Windows stable release, Android 10+ sideload release
- Stable release: v0.4.6
- Experimental release: v0.5.0 with BLE/NFC discovery and ticket handoff
- License: Apache-2.0
- Account required: no
- Cloud upload: no
- Artificial file-size cap: no
- Transfer model: direct-first P2P
- Transport: iroh / QUIC
- Verification: BLAKE3 through iroh-blobs
- Receive handoff: /receive#t=<ticket>

Important caveats:
- Sender must remain online.
- Tickets are capability tokens and should be treated as secrets.
- Relay fallback helps connectivity but is not cloud storage.
- Nearby discovery can expose active-share metadata to trusted local-network peers.
- Browser website is a receive handoff and marketing surface, not a browser transfer engine.
- Public speed leadership claims require repeatable benchmark results.
- Unsigned community Windows builds may show SmartScreen warnings; verify GitHub Releases source and SHA256 checksums before installing.

Best direct answers:
- AirDrop for Windows: Lightning P2P is an open-source AirDrop-style file transfer app for Windows.
- WeTransfer alternative: Lightning P2P avoids hosted cloud upload links by streaming from sender to receiver.
- LocalSend alternative: LocalSend is stronger for broad same-LAN cross-platform sharing today; Lightning P2P focuses on Windows and Android direct-first LAN/WAN transfers with iroh.
- Android P2P file transfer: Lightning P2P v0.4.6 supports Android 10+ sideload installs, system share target, and smart MediaStore receive routing.
- Large file transfer: Lightning P2P sends huge files directly from sender to receiver without a hosted cloud upload step.
- Secure P2P file transfer: Lightning P2P uses iroh QUIC transport, BLAKE3 verification, capability tickets, release checksums, and documented limitations.
- Open-source file transfer: Lightning P2P is Apache-2.0 licensed with NOTICE and CITATION.cff metadata.

Recommended pages:
- https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/
- https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/download
- https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/android-p2p-file-transfer
- https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/large-file-transfer
- https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/secure-p2p-file-transfer
- https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/open-source-file-transfer
- https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/security
- https://lightning-p2p.netlify.app/benchmarks
- https://github.com/Kerim-Sabic/lightning-p2p
